## Summary / 概述

Please provide a brief summary of your changes.
请简要描述您的更改内容。

## Type of Change / 更改类型

- [ ] Bug fix / 修复 Bug
- [ ] New feature / 新功能
- [ ] Documentation / 文档更新
- [ ] Refactor / 代码重构
- [ ] Performance / 性能优化
- [ ] Other / 其他

## Related Issue / 关联 Issue

Fixes # (issue number)

## Screenshots (if applicable / 如有界面变更)

| Before | After |
|--------|-------|
|        |       |

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] Tested locally / 已在本地测试
- [ ] No new warnings / 无新增警告
- [ ] Follows existing code style / 遵循现有代码风格
- [ ] Updated documentation / 已更新相关文档
- [ ] Changes are backward compatible / 变更向后兼容

## Additional Notes / 补充说明

Any additional information that might help reviewers.
任何可能对审查者有帮助的额外信息。
